title: Program
description: An organizational unit or public-facing program of the Bronx District Attorney — a prosecutorial bureau/division (Trial, Investigations, Special Victims, Strategic Enforcement, General Counsel) or an outreach/diversion program. Reverse-engineered from the office's /html/bureaus/ and /html/outreach/ SHTML pages. No API or Open Data today.

name.description: Name of the bureau, division, unit, or program.

kind.description: What kind of program this is.

audience.description: Who it serves (e.g. victims, immigrants, community members, defendants seeking sealing).

eligibility.description: Eligibility criteria, where applicable (e.g. CPL 160.59 sealing criteria).
